$comment: Word-list provenance registry. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the license gate (scripts/license-gate.mjs) and the attribution surface (scripts/gen-credits.mjs -> credits.json). D2: exactly ONE source per language, no merging. A language MUST have a complete entry here AND a complete sources/<lang>/ directory (fetch script + LICENSE + PROVENANCE.md) before any wordlists/<lang>.txt is allowed to exist.

tiers.A: Ship-free. Permissive / public-domain (MIT, BSD, Apache-2.0, CC0, Unicode). No attribution required to redistribute derived data.
tiers.B: Attribution + share-alike. Copyleft or CC BY-SA (GPL, LGPL, MPL, CC BY-SA). Must credit the source (credits.json) and preserve the source's terms on the DATA files. NOTE: shipping copyleft-derived data inside a closed binary is a posture decision for Eric, not this pipeline.
tiers.C: Restricted. Usable only unmodified and/or server-side, or otherwise limited. STOP AND ASK before any use; never ship a modified/derived list.

credits.name: Recursos Lingüísticos Abiertos del Español (rla-es)
credits.attribution: Spanish word data derived from Recursos Lingüísticos Abiertos del Español (rla-es), © the RLA-ES contributors, tri-licensed GPLv3 / LGPLv3 / MPL-1.1.
